specs.title: TC-001: Page loads successfully with all elements visible
TC-002: Form renders with correct field types and attributes
TC-003: Navigation links direct to correct pages
TC-004: Submit button is disabled during form submission
TC-008: Password minimum length validation - 5 characters
TC-009: Password minimum length validation - 6 characters (boundary)
TC-010: Empty form submission with HTML5 validation
TC-012: Invalid email format
TC-013: Email with special characters
TC-014: Empty name field
TC-015: Empty email field
TC-016: Empty password field
TC-017: Name with special characters
TC-018: Very long name (100+ characters)

TC-028: Password with only letters
TC-032: Rapid consecutive signup submissions
TC-033: Password visibility toggle (if implemented)
TC-034: Form submission with Enter key
TC-035: Page refresh clears form data
TC-036: Back button navigation preserves form state
TC-040: Signup with already logged in user

TC-050: Form field hover state

TC-053: Responsive design on mobile viewport
TC-054: Responsive design on tablet viewport

TC-059: Maximum field length validation - name
TC-060: Maximum field length validation - password
TC-064: Form field autocomplete behavior

TC-072: Accessibility - Screen reader compatibility
TC-073: Error message dismissibility
TC-074: Multiple error messages handling
TC-075: Form validation before submission
TC-076: Name field accepts hyphens and apostrophes

TC-079: Password with spaces
TC-080: Guest session link preserves context
TC-081: Direct navigation to signup when authenticated
TC-083: Form field placeholder visibility

TC-090: Font loading and rendering
TC-091: Color contrast compliance

TC-029: Email with leading/trailing spaces

TC-037: Access token expiration handling
TC-038: Refresh token expiration handling

specs.title: TC-SU-001 | Page title renders correctly in browser tab
TC-SU-002 | Page heading "Create your account" is visible
TC-SU-003 | Subtitle "Free forever · No credit card needed" renders below heading
TC-SU-004 | NexusAI hexagon logo icon is visible above heading
TC-SU-005 | Form card renders with white background, border, and shadow

TC-SU-008 | Navbar displays four navigation links
TC-SU-009 | Language selector button shows "🌐 EN" with dropdown indicator

TC-SU-011 | Navbar "Get Started" button is visible with accent fill
TC-SU-012 | Full Name field renders with label and placeholder
